description: Raw user input examples with expected canonical_profile_v1 outputs for future deterministic profile normalization evaluation.

cases.raw_input: I speak English and Spanish, no college degree, looking for remote beginner AI data or language tasks.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: I speak English and Spanish, no college degree, looking for remote beginner AI data or language tasks.

evidence_snippets: I speak English and Spanish, no college degree, looking for remote beginner AI data or language tasks.

cases.review_notes: No unsupported languages or degree should be invented.

cases.raw_input: Profile bilingual support volunteer. Languages English fluent, Spanish native. Education high school. Seeking remote entry-level data annotation; no phone calls preferred.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: Profile bilingual support volunteer. Languages English fluent, Spanish native. Education high school. Seeking remote entry-level data annotation; no phone calls preferred.

evidence_snippets: Profile bilingual support volunteer. Languages English fluent, Spanish native. Education high school. Seeking remote entry-level data annotation; no phone calls

cases.review_notes: Phone preference is a preference, not an eligibility rule.

cases.raw_input: need remote work. english/spanish. beginner. no degree. can review websites maybe

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: need remote work. english/spanish. beginner. no degree. can review websites maybe

evidence_snippets: need remote work. english/spanish. beginner. no degree. can review websites maybe

cases.review_notes: Sparse input should preserve uncertainty.

cases.raw_input: Portuguese native speaker in Brazil with advanced English. I have content review and search quality experience and want remote AI evaluation work.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: Portuguese native speaker in Brazil with advanced English. I have content review and search quality experience and want remote AI evaluation work.

evidence_snippets: Portuguese native speaker in Brazil with advanced English. I have content review and search quality experience and want remote AI evaluation work.

cases.review_notes: Brazil is location evidence and Portuguese is explicit language evidence.

cases.raw_input: I worked on app reviews, ads quality checks, and translation QA. My strongest language is Brazilian Portuguese and I use English daily. I prefer remote flexible work and non-phone tasks.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: I worked on app reviews, ads quality checks, and translation QA. My strongest language is Brazilian Portuguese and I use English daily. I prefer remote flexible work and non-phone

evidence_snippets: I worked on app reviews, ads quality checks, and translation QA. My strongest language is Brazilian Portuguese and I use English daily. I prefer remote flexible

cases.review_notes: Non-phone is a preference, not a hard exclusion.

cases.raw_input: Language QA Analyst Portuguese BR, English. 3 years content moderation and search relevance review. Location Sao Paulo, Brazil. Open to freelance remote AI rater roles.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: Language QA Analyst Portuguese BR, English. 3 years content moderation and search relevance review. Location Sao Paulo, Brazil. Open to freelance remote AI rater roles.

evidence_snippets: Language QA Analyst Portuguese BR, English. 3 years content moderation and search relevance review. Location Sao Paulo, Brazil. Open to freelance remote AI rate

cases.review_notes: Years are explicit here and should be captured.

cases.raw_input: Translator: English, Spanish, Portuguese and French. I do localization, MTPE, audio QA and language review.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: Translator: English, Spanish, Portuguese and French. I do localization, MTPE, audio QA and language review.

evidence_snippets: Translator: English, Spanish, Portuguese and French. I do localization, MTPE, audio QA and language review.

cases.review_notes: Multiple languages are explicit, but locale is unknown.

cases.raw_input: Freelance localization specialist, 6 years. ES to EN and PT-BR to EN, French reading. Tools QA checks, subtitles, audio validation.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: Freelance localization specialist, 6 years. ES to EN and PT-BR to EN, French reading. Tools QA checks, subtitles, audio validation.

evidence_snippets: Freelance localization specialist, 6 years. ES to EN and PT-BR to EN, French reading. Tools QA checks, subtitles, audio validation.

cases.review_notes: French is reading-level only, not full bilingual fluency.

cases.raw_input: spanish portuguese french english; did translation audio checks; remote ok

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: spanish portuguese french english; did translation audio checks; remote ok

evidence_snippets: spanish portuguese french english; did translation audio checks; remote ok

cases.review_notes: Languages are present but proficiency and locale are unknown.

cases.raw_input: I am an English teacher. I can review grammar, writing feedback and student answers. Looking for remote AI writing evaluation.

identity.display_name: English Teacher Seeking Remote AI Work

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: I am an English teacher. I can review grammar, writing feedback and student answers. Looking for remote AI writing evaluation.

evidence_snippets: I am an English teacher. I can review grammar, writing feedback and student answers. Looking for remote AI writing evaluation.

cases.review_notes: Teaching and writing feedback are explicit; no second language should be inferred.

cases.raw_input: BA English Education. ESL tutor and writing instructor, 5 years. Skills grammar correction, rubric grading, content review. Prefers part-time remote work.

identity.display_name: English Teacher Seeking Remote AI Work

evidence_snippets: BA English Education. ESL tutor and writing instructor, 5 years. Skills grammar correction, rubric grading, content review. Prefers part-time remote work.

evidence_snippets: Python backend engineer, interested in AI coding evaluations and code review. Remote contract preferred.

evidence_snippets: I have built web services in Python and JavaScript and reviewed pull requests. I do not have biology or medical credentials, but I can evaluate coding tasks and

cases.review_notes: Explicit absence of medical or science credentials should be preserved.

evidence_snippets: PhD microbiologist with academic research and scientific writing experience. I can review biology and medicine-related AI outputs, but I am not a licensed physi

evidence_snippets: Research Scientist, microbiology. PhD Biology, 7 years lab research, publications in antimicrobial resistance. No clinical license listed.

evidence_snippets: biology phd, papers, can do science review. medical license? no

cases.raw_input: Lawyer with contract and IP experience, interested in legal AI training and expert review. Remote work preferred.

cases.raw_input: PhD historian. I do archival research, source evaluation, academic writing and fact checking. Looking for remote humanities AI tasks.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: Lecturer and historian, PhD, 4 years teaching. French reading for archival sources. Publications in modern history. Remote research evaluation preferred.

evidence_snippets: Lecturer and historian, PhD, 4 years teaching. French reading for archival sources. Publications in modern history. Remote research evaluation preferred.

cases.raw_input: No degree. I can do online research, social media review, content moderation and simple annotation. Need remote flexible work.

matcher_compatible_profile.summary: No degree. I can do online research, social media review, content moderation and simple annotation. Need remote flexible work.

evidence_snippets: No degree. I can do online research, social media review, content moderation and simple annotation. Need remote flexible work.

evidence_snippets: remote tasks pls. can write review. no college. not coding. not calls
